title: Add centronias SSH key to authorized_keys

log.context: Add centronias SSH key to authorized_keys

Done. Here's what was completed:

1. Created `/home/clungus/.ssh/` if needed, appended centronias's key to `/home/clungus/.ssh/authorized_keys`, and set correct permissions (`700` on `.ssh`, `600` on `authorized_keys`).

2. Verified the key is present — it's the last entry in `authorized_keys` (the `me@centronias.com` RSA key).

3. Posted the connection instructions to Discord channel `1486258651818623007`.
